title: Stamp Duty (Agency for International Development of the United States of America-Tanzania) (Exemption) Order, 1974
title_en: Stamp Duty (Agency for International Development of the United States of America-Tanzania) (Exemption) Order, 1974

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Stamp Duty (Agency for International Development of America-Tanzania) (Exemption) Order.
The instruments specified in the Schedule hereto shall be exempt from and shall not be liable or chargeable with the payment of any duty under the Stamp Duty Act.

[Revokes the Stamp Duty (Agency for International Development of the United States of America-Tanzania) (Exemption) Order 1 .] 1 G.N. No. 207 of 1974 Schedule Any tenancy, lease or transfer of a right of occupancy whereby any tenancy or lease is granted or any right of occupancy is transferred to the said Agency.
